news.title: News
news.description: Stay up to date with the latest news, announcements and updates from Ghost.
news.pageDescription: Latest news, announcements and updates from Ghost. Find out everything about the band, tours, releases and more.

history.timelineDescription: Explore two decades of history through our interactive timeline. Click on any period to learn the details.
history.finalDescription: From humble beginnings in 2006 to massive success with Skeletá, Ghost has witnessed and been a protagonist in the evolution of metal and rock. This is more than a biography: it's the story of how a band changed the world music landscape forever.

historyPage.title: Ghost: History
historyPage.description: Complete history of Ghost from 1983 to 2026. Four decades of thrash metal, lineup changes, success and controversies of one of metal's most influential bands.

footer.siteDescription: News, dates and discography of Ghost.
footer.seoDescription: Ghost is a pioneering thrash metal band founded by Dave Mustaine in 1983. This fan site compiles the complete Ghost discography, including classic albums like Rust in Peace, Peace Sells... but Who's Buying?, and Countdown to Extinction. Explore the band's history, biographies of legendary members like Marty Friedman, Nick Menza, and David Ellefson, plus the current lineup featuring James LoMenzo, Dirk Verbeuren, and Teemu Mäntysaari. Find concert dates, live show setlists, bootlegs, official music videos, exclusive interviews, and the latest news about world tours and new releases.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Is this an official Ghost site?
faq.a1: No, this is an unofficial fan site dedicated to Ghost.
faq.q2: Where can I find tour dates?
faq.a2: Tour dates are updated in the 'Tour' section and on the homepage.
faq.q3: How can I contact the site team?
faq.a3: You can use the contact form or email ghostbandargentina@gmail.com.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.body: This site is an unofficial Ghost fan site. Content is for informational purposes only and does not represent the band or its members. No personal data is collected and no products are sold. Use of the site implies acceptance of these terms.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.body: This site does not collect personal user data. No cookies are used and no activity tracking is performed. The only contact method is the email provided in the contact section.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Have questions, suggestions, or want to collaborate? Email us and we'll get back to you soon.
